name: bincalc
$comment: Full default qtbase features. We tried default-features:false + a minimal feature set to shrink the build, but it broke rendering: dropping `png` killed the app icon (loaded from :/icons/app-*.png), and dropping the defaults also broke the Top/Signed checkboxes (native Windows widget style). Full defaults reproduce the dynamic-Qt CI/release builds exactly. Port versions are pinned by builtin-baseline (bump it to move Qt); only consumed when CMake runs with the vcpkg toolchain (Release workflow).
